title: Information Regarding Low Carbon Fuel Standard Regulation Updates
content:
The California Air Resources Board (CARB) is issuing this notice to inform market
participants and the public of the Office of Administrative Lawâ€™s (OAL) decision to
disapprove amendments to the Low Carbon Fuel Standard (LCFS) Regulation.1 CARB
approved these LCFS amendments for adoption at a November 8, 2024, hearing.
author: Analysts Account
